settings.content: Start your business journey with Ecomus
[Get EComposer Page Builder for Free (only The4 users)](https://ecomposer.app/referral?ref=The4)

Use Ecomus and explore all the tools and services you need to start, run, and grow your business. We know that Ecomus will make your life easier by improving your workflow. With the tools that Ecomus gives you, you will realize your true design potential without the need to know any coding. We would be glad if you help us to improve our theme, installation process or documentation.
[The4 Studio's](https://the4.co/) experienced team designs impressive Shopify themes that are easy to install and customize. Start your website quickly with our dedicated support.

For installation help, check our [documentation](https://support.the4.co/collections/ecomus) or open a [support ticket](https://support.the4.co/login). We love improving our themes, so please share any technical issues or suggestions. Thanks for being a customer!
Enjoy exclusive offers from our growing network of partners! See the list of [offers here](https://support.the4.co/user/earnings) (need login to our support system).
For expert custom development at an affordable cost, [contact The4](https://the4.co/pages/contact-us).

settings.label: Allowed navigation countries
settings.info: Use Country 2 letter ISO code separated by comma. e.g. US,CA,MX

settings.label: Allowed Europe Nav navigation countries
settings.info: Use Country 2 letter ISO code separated by comma. e.g. US,CA,MX

definition.label: Secondary text
definition.info: Choose a color close to the primary text.

definition.label: Gradient
definition.info: Background gradient replaces background where possible.

definition.label: Secondary background
definition.info: Choose a color close to the primary background.

settings.label: CSS rules to specify families
Thickness border
settings.info: Not use for button style link

settings.label: Automatic "New" badge period
settings.info: Set a number of days to keep your products marked as "New" after creation

settings.label: Activate this information box in all products
Activate this information box in all products
Action when people click added wishlist:
Enable compare popup
settings.info: Will show popup when after click to add compare or click button added compare. (Does not work with EcomRise)

settings.label: Use collection link on vendor
settings.info: Replace vendor link to collection link. Requires exist a collection has the name same as the vendor of the product. [Learn more](https://support.the4.co/articles/how-to-use-the-collection-link-on-vendortype)

settings.label: Use collection link on type
settings.info: Replace type link to collection link. Requires exist a collection has the name same as the type of the product. [Learn more](https://support.the4.co/articles/how-to-use-the-collection-link-on-vendortype)

settings.label: Use Linked Canonical
settings.info: Using the default linked product canonical fallback, all linked product will have same canonical link as the first product within the linked collection
